steps.title: Set up
steps.content: For $ax^2+bx+c=0$, Vieta's formula gives product of solutions $= \frac{c}{a}$. Here $a=21$ and $c=rs$, so the product of solutions $= \frac{rs}{21}$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: The problem says the product equals $krs$. Set the two equal: $$\frac{rs}{21}=krs$$ Divide both sides by $rs$ (positive, so nonzero): $$k=\frac{1}{21}$$
